evidence.source_title: Seyyed Abdulkarim Mousavi Ardabili — Iran 1988 Massacre
evidence.description: As Chief Justice and head of the Supreme Judicial Council, oversaw the judicial apparatus that enabled the Death Commissions. Publicly advocated for execution of MEK prisoners at Friday prayers on 5 August 1988.
Listed on the Iran Tribunal's List of Perpetrators for the 1988 mass executions.

editorial_notes: Was the highest judicial authority during the executions. Not a direct member of the Tehran Death Commission but oversaw the system.
